title: NPB予測サイトのテーマ方向性を確定 (DESIGN.md基準+複数案比較)
description: 統治: hohho_worlds/companies/npb-predictions/WORKSTREAM_DASHBOARD.md。web/DESIGN.md(白ベースクリーン+野球ボール配色)を基準に、スクショ/既存CSSと比較し テーマ候補を複数案で提示できる状態にする。Open: 既存vs改良案 か 複数方向性案か未確定→着手時にユーザー確認。
close_reason: Release theme finalized as editorial-navy-ivory; DESIGN.md/runtime defaults/tests aligned; npm run ci and npm run build:cf passed; /settings browser screenshot verified Navy Ivory ON

title: P0: 本番Cloudflare 1102とスコアボード過負荷を解消してリリースゲートを実測化
description: 2026-07-22 release audit evidence: production / and /rankings/scoreboard?year=2026&view=trend intermittently return CF 1102 (503). Scoreboard has 200 responses ranging 27KB to 4.2MB and 0.1-3.2s, proving inconsistent data/rendering. Root-cause candidates confirmed in source: scoreboard page invokes getScoreboardData for every season in parallel, and each invocation queries season, standings, all users, predictions, and all rankingPicks; home page makes four no-store same-origin API fetches. Existing feature-health only validates data existence, not public route status, size, or latency. Completion: bound DB query scope and SSR payload; eliminate intermittent 1102 under repeated public-route probe; add CI/prod monitor for 5xx rate, response size, and latency for /, /news, /seo/2026, scoreboard; confirm authenticated and unauthenticated journey transitions.
